productDisplayName: Mother Earth Women Printed Cream Kurta
description: Composition Cream, red and green printed kurta made of cotton fabric, has a mandarin collar with a slit neckline, three quarter sleeves with piping on the cuffs, half buttoned placket with fabric covered buttons and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash Care Hand wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent as colour may bleed Flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not soak Certain fabrics will shrink mother earth's focus on providing livelihoods for rural artisans resulted in this handmade kurta that fuses earthy goodness with a modern cut and silhouette. This piece epitomises how fashion, vintage styling and comfort unite to create the perfect Indian tunic. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting capris or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings and embellished slippers. Model Statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
